title: Junior Instructional Designer at Manya Group South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Manya Group South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manya Group South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Manya Group South Asia Partners:
Manya Group South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group South Asia Partners!
